Hello Team,
Delete job completed successfully but number of rows delete is zero. Please check the status manually.
Last record in DB is of Date - %DOCTIMESTAMP%.

StoredProcedure End Time: %endTime%.
Thanks, OneHub webMethods

Hello All,
Deletion job failed to run. Please see below error logs.

Thanks, OneHub webMethods
